info.title: SportsDataIO NCAA Basketball (CBB) API
info.description: API for NCAA College Basketball (CBB) data including scores, schedules, standings, team and player information, box scores, tournament brackets (March Madness), and betting odds. Provided by SportsDataIO.

get.description: Returns a boolean indicating whether any NCAA basketball games are currently in progress.
Returns the current active season for NCAA basketball.
Returns conference information including team standings and rankings.
Returns comprehensive team profiles for all NCAA basketball teams, including school names, logos, conferences, stadiums, and AP rankings.
Returns basic team information for all NCAA basketball teams.
Returns biographical and injury details for all active NCAA basketball players.
Returns roster information for a specified team.
Returns stadium/venue details including location coordinates and capacity.
Returns the full schedule of games for a given season, including tournament (March Madness) games with bracket, round, and seed information.
Returns all games scheduled for a specific date.
Returns the NCAA tournament (March Madness) bracket for a given season, including matchups, seeds, rounds, and results.
Returns the box score for a specific game, including player and team statistics.
Returns box scores for all games on a specific date.
Returns season statistics for all teams in a given season.
Returns season statistics for all players in a given season.
Returns season statistics for players on a specific team.
Returns betting odds for all games on a specific date.
Returns betting events for a given season including market and outcome data.
Returns metadata for betting market types, bet types, and resulting combinations.
Returns a list of active sportsbooks with unique identifiers.
Returns team standings for a given season.

apiKeyQuery.name: key
apiKeyQuery.description: API key passed as a query parameter.

apiKeyHeader.name: Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: API key passed in the request header.

season.name: season
season.description: The season year (e.g., 2025, 2024). Optionally with season type suffix (e.g., 2025POST for postseason/March Madness, 2025REG for regular season).

Season.description: The calendar year of the season.

Game.description: Represents an NCAA basketball game. Tournament games include bracket, round, and seed data for March Madness.

Status.description: Scheduled, InProgress, Final, Canceled, Postponed, etc.

TournamentID.description: ID of the tournament (e.g., NCAA March Madness).

Bracket.description: Tournament bracket/region name (e.g., East, West, South, Midwest).

AwayTeamSeed.description: Seed of the away team in the tournament.

HomeTeamSeed.description: Seed of the home team in the tournament.

Tournament.description: Represents an NCAA tournament (March Madness) bracket.
